loginRequiredDescription: Sign in to view your usage.
noCollectedUsageDescription: Install the collector to automatically capture Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor usage.
noMyUsageDescription: No usage for the selected period and tool.
temporaryUnavailableDescription: The usage data store is recovering or under load. Other areas remain available.
summaryPrimaryHint: Total cost for the selected period
compositionDescription: Token share by model and device
rhythmDescription: Token density by weekday and hour

toolActivity.title: AI tool activity
toolActivity.description: MCP, skill, and plugin activity confirmed in the selected period
toolActivity.empty: No tool activity was confirmed in this period.
toolActivity.name: Name

filters.rangeLimited: Showing up to the last 12 months

pricingNotice.unpricedTitle: Cost total is incomplete because {count} usage events have no confirmed price.
pricingNotice.unpricedAction: Prices are checked automatically. Once a price is available, it is applied without any administrator action.
pricingNotice.legacyTitle: {count} usage events use stored legacy costs.
pricingNotice.legacyDescription: These costs are included in the total, but the legacy data has no pricing revision provenance.

history.title: My history
history.loginRequiredDescription: Sign in to view your history.
history.disabledDescription: Configure a key management provider or the legacy server content key to open prompts and responses.
history.emptyDescription: Turn on content collection in the shim (TOARD_SHIM_COLLECT_CONTENT=1) to see it here.
history.noMatchDescription: Try adjusting the period or tool filter.
history.notFoundDescription: It may have been removed or is not accessible.
history.contentUnavailable: Content cannot be opened. Check the key management provider status.
history.truncatedNote: Long conversation — showing the first {limit} turns.
history.codeDiagramHint: Render Mermaid as a diagram; use Read or Raw for the source
history.codeReadHint: Long lines wrap to the panel width; use Raw for original scrolling
history.codeDiagramFailed: Couldn't render the diagram. Use Read or Raw to inspect the source.

e2ee.title: End-to-end encrypted history
e2ee.notActive: E2EE history is not active yet. Enable it under History security in Settings.
e2ee.lockedDescription: Content is decrypted only in this browser. Approve it from a connected computer, or use the Recovery Kit only as a last resort.
e2ee.approvalCommand: Run `toard-shim e2ee approve` on a connected computer and enter this code.
e2ee.recoveryLocalOnly: The words never leave this browser and are used only in memory.
e2ee.legacyComplete: All history is protected with E2EE
e2ee.empty: No E2EE history has been saved yet.
e2ee.truncated: Long conversation — showing the first 500 turns.
e2ee.error: E2EE history could not be opened ({code}).

migration.title: Updating history security
migration.description: This browser is decrypting E2EE records locally and safely converting them to server-managed encryption. Partial records are not mixed into history before completion.
migration.ciphertextPreserved: If conversion pauses or the key is unavailable, the existing ciphertext remains stored on the server.
migration.blockedTitle: Conversion is paused until the key is found
migration.blockedDescription: The history content cannot be viewed because the current key cannot decrypt it. Existing ciphertext is not deleted.
migration.confirmTitle: Are you sure the key cannot be recovered?
migration.confirmDescription: Conversion will pause and preserve the ciphertext. No records are deleted, and you can resume later if you find the key.
